results.question: Which three North American countries will host the 2026 FIFA's Women World Cup, the first to be co-hosted by three nations and the first North American World Cup since 1994?
results.ground_truth: There won't be a FIFA's Women World Cup in 2026.
results.predicted: False premise — there is no 2026 FIFA Women's World Cup.

results.question: Who is the only female artist to have topped Spotify's list of most-streamed artists in three consecutive years (2020–2022)?
results.predicted: No female artist topped Spotify's most-streamed list in 2020–2022; Bad Bunny (male) topped it all three years.

results.question: Which tropical rainforest represents a quarter of the total area of remaining tropical forests on Earth and comprises one of the largest and most biodiverse tracts of tropical rainforest in the world?
results.predicted: The question contains a false premise — no single rainforest satisfies both descriptions. The Congolian rainforests contain a quarter of the world's remaining tropical forest, while the Amazon rainforest is the largest and most biodiverse tract.

results.question: How many countries did both Donald Trump (during his first term) and Joe Biden visit during their presidencies, including the West Bank?
